data.body: WRITE-PATH TRIO COMPLETE + committed: E5c relocation (e6e645ae), transition/reopen (41217cc7), claim (bf24646d). REMAINING in E3: compact/compact-all (sync-before-compact, forward-compat unknown-type partition, exit 0/1/2/3/10), scratch (filesystem-only, no init), delete (destructive, --user-approved + children guard + UNLINK scan). Paused for user review at the write-path boundary.
